meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup to Scale Apps
content.seo_description: Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to break past basic app limitations. A step-by-step guide for freelancers to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: To break past basic app limitations, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and complex logic. By treating your CLI as a senior architect, you move from manual coding to iterative refinement, allowing you to ship production-ready, high-complexity SaaS features in a fraction of the usual development time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a half-finished project, the code feels brittle, and the deadline is breathing down your neck. The difference between a high-earning freelancer and one stuck in the 'tutorial trap' isn't just effort—it's the velocity of your build pipeline. When your tools work against you, your potential remains locked behind manual drudgery.

But what if your terminal could act as a force multiplier? By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your workflow from reactive debugging into proactive architecture. This is the shift from writing lines of code to orchestrating complex, scalable systems that keep your clients coming back.

steps.title: Initialize the Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Establish a robust project structure that handles dependencies and environment variables automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Node.js project structure with TypeScript, ESLint, and a modular architecture pattern.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate with Context
steps.description: Use Claude Code to read your existing codebase and generate missing features without context switching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and generate a CRUD API controller for a 'Subscription' entity following clean architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate subscription controller with validation'

steps.title: Refactor for Performance
steps.description: Identify bottlenecks in your code and let AI suggest optimized patterns for asynchronous operations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current data fetching logic for performance bottlenecks and implement a memoization pattern.

steps.title: Automated Testing Pipeline
steps.description: Ensure your code is bulletproof by generating unit tests for every new module immediately upon creation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive test suite using Jest for the newly generated subscription controller, covering edge cases.

steps.title: Final Deployment Readiness Check
steps.description: Verify your configuration and environment setups before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current deployment configuration for security vulnerabilities and environment variable leaks.

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from reading massive node_modules or build folders, keeping context windows clean and costs low.
Chain your prompts: Ask Antigravity for the 'architectural plan' first, then feed that specific plan into Claude Code to execute the implementation.
Use 'claude config' to set your persona as a 'Senior Staff Engineer' so the output prioritizes maintainability over quick-and-dirty hacks.
Leverage the 'Claude Terminal History' to refine repetitive tasks; if you find yourself running a command twice, turn it into a custom CLI alias.
When debugging, pipe your error logs directly into the Claude Code prompt using the --error flag to get immediate, context-aware remediation.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, integrate your custom AI-driven workflow into a CI/CD pipeline (like GitHub Actions) to automate the deployment of your generated features.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your IDE and start building high-value systems that scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
